condition_cn: 条件：90分钟常规时间打平；输入包括完整90分钟预测、平局比分分布、淘汰赛证据、常规时间Tail与MAS结论。

points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段时间短且淘汰赛风险偏好下降，仍平是基础高概率分支。
points.rationale_en: Because extra time is short and knockout risk appetite falls, remaining level is the high-probability baseline branch.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时偷袭 / 一球决胜
points.rationale_cn: United States凭借体能、替补或压迫优势在加时净胜一球。
points.rationale_en: United States wins extra time by one goal through fitness, bench impact or pressing advantage.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时偷袭 / 一球决胜
points.rationale_cn: Bosnia and Herzegovina凭借体能、替补或反击效率在加时净胜一球。
points.rationale_en: Bosnia and Herzegovina wins extra time by one goal through fitness, bench impact or counterattacking efficiency.

points.tail_title_cn: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
points.rationale_cn: United States在对手体能或心理崩盘后拉开比分。
points.rationale_en: United States pulls away after the opponent shows a physical or psychological drop-off.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球
points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段比赛打开，双方各有一次有效转化。
points.tail_title_en: Open extra time / both teams score
points.rationale_en: Extra time opens up and both teams convert one meaningful chance.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球，体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段体能崩溃或开放对攻形成的低频高偏离路径。
points.tail_title_en: Open extra time / both teams score, Fatigue collapse / extra-time breakthrough
points.rationale_en: A low-frequency tail path where fatigue or open extra-time play creates a wider scoring swing.

points.tail_title_cn: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
points.rationale_cn: Bosnia and Herzegovina在对手压上后连续制造转换机会。
points.rationale_en: Bosnia and Herzegovina creates repeated transition chances after the opponent pushes forward.

points.tail_title_cn: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段体能崩溃或开放对攻形成的低频高偏离路径。
points.rationale_en: A low-frequency tail path where fatigue or open extra-time play creates a wider scoring swing.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球
points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段体能崩溃或开放对攻形成的低频高偏离路径。
points.tail_title_en: Open extra time / both teams score
points.rationale_en: A low-frequency tail path where fatigue or open extra-time play creates a wider scoring swing.

points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段体能崩溃或开放对攻形成的低频高偏离路径。
points.rationale_en: A low-frequency tail path where fatigue or open extra-time play creates a wider scoring swing.

points.rationale_cn: 由统一淘汰赛路径分布派生。
points.rationale_en: Derived from the unified knockout path distribution.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球
points.rationale_cn: 双方加时互有进球但仍未分胜负的补充覆盖路径。
points.tail_title_en: Open extra time / both teams score
points.rationale_en: A supplementary extra-time path where both teams score but the match remains level.

points.rationale_cn: 由统一淘汰赛路径分布派生。
points.rationale_en: Derived from the unified knockout path distribution.

points.rationale_cn: 由统一淘汰赛路径分布派生。
points.rationale_en: Derived from the unified knockout path distribution.

tail_focus.label: 加时偷袭 / 一球决胜
tail_focus.label_cn: 加时偷袭 / 一球决胜
tail_focus.definition_cn: 加时30分钟内通过反击、定位球或替补冲击形成1球胜负。
tail_focus.rationale_cn: United States凭借体能、替补或压迫优势在加时净胜一球。
tail_focus.definition_en: A one-goal extra-time result is produced through a counterattack, set piece or substitute impact.
tail_focus.rationale_en: United States wins extra time by one goal through fitness, bench impact or pressing advantage.

tail_focus.label: 加时开放 / 双方进球
tail_focus.label_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球
tail_focus.definition_cn: 加时阶段双方均有进球，比赛从谨慎拖入开放对攻。
tail_focus.rationale_cn: 加时阶段比赛打开，双方各有一次有效转化。
tail_focus.label_en: Open extra time / both teams score
tail_focus.definition_en: Both teams score in extra time as the match shifts from caution into open exchanges.
tail_focus.rationale_en: Extra time opens up and both teams convert one meaningful chance.

tail_focus.label: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
tail_focus.label_cn: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
tail_focus.definition_cn: 加时净胜至少2球，或总进球达到3球以上的一方打穿路径。
tail_focus.rationale_cn: United States在对手体能或心理崩盘后拉开比分。
tail_focus.definition_en: A team wins extra time by at least two goals, or the extra-time segment reaches three or more total goals.
tail_focus.rationale_en: United States pulls away after the opponent shows a physical or psychological drop-off.

key_factors.label_cn: 美国边路破低位延续到加时
key_factors.impact_cn: 美国若主要边路爆点仍在场，并能保持宽度和禁区回做，加时仍有小幅运动战优势。
key_factors.label_en: U.S. width remains the main extra-time route against Bosnia's low block
key_factors.impact_en: If the U.S. still has its main wide threats on the pitch and can keep width plus cutbacks into the box, it retains a slight open-play edge in extra time.
key_factors.text_cn: 美国若主要边路爆点仍在场，并能保持宽度和禁区回做，加时仍有小幅运动战优势。
key_factors.text_en: If the U.S. still has its main wide threats on the pitch and can keep width plus cutbacks into the box, it retains a slight open-play edge in extra time.

key_factors.impact_cn: 波黑中卫群和后腰保护能压缩点球点与六码区之间空间，使美国进攻转向外围循环和传中。
key_factors.label_en: Bosnia's compact low block can still slow the match
key_factors.impact_en: Bosnia's center-backs and midfield protection can compress the space between the penalty spot and six-yard box, pushing the U.S. toward circulation and crosses.
key_factors.text_cn: 波黑中卫群和后腰保护能压缩点球点与六码区之间空间，使美国进攻转向外围循环和传中。
key_factors.text_en: Bosnia's center-backs and midfield protection can compress the space between the penalty spot and six-yard box, pushing the U.S. toward circulation and crosses.

key_factors.impact_cn: 若Džeko或另一名高点仍在场，波黑可通过长传、二点球和前场定位球制造低频高杠杆机会。
key_factors.label_en: Džeko and set pieces remain Bosnia's high-leverage path
key_factors.impact_en: If Džeko or another aerial target remains on the pitch, Bosnia can create low-frequency, high-leverage chances through long balls, second balls and set pieces.
key_factors.text_cn: 若Džeko或另一名高点仍在场，波黑可通过长传、二点球和前场定位球制造低频高杠杆机会。
key_factors.text_en: If Džeko or another aerial target remains on the pitch, Bosnia can create low-frequency, high-leverage chances through long balls, second balls and set pieces.

key_factors.impact_cn: 美国更想在运动战解决，波黑更能接受拖入点球；这会同时提高美国压上和波黑反击空间。
key_factors.label_en: The risk split sharpens after 70 minutes and into extra time
key_factors.impact_en: The U.S. would rather resolve the match in open play, while Bosnia is more willing to extend it to penalties; this raises both U.S. pressure and Bosnia's transition space.
key_factors.text_cn: 美国更想在运动战解决，波黑更能接受拖入点球；这会同时提高美国压上和波黑反击空间。
key_factors.text_en: The U.S. would rather resolve the match in open play, while Bosnia is more willing to extend it to penalties; this raises both U.S. pressure and Bosnia's transition space.

key_factors.impact_cn: 美国主场和替补深度支持加时小优，但波黑并无明确体能崩盘证据，因此优势不能放大。
key_factors.label_en: Home context and bench width give the U.S. only a modest edge
key_factors.impact_en: Home context and bench depth support only a modest U.S. extra-time edge, because there is no clear evidence of a Bosnia fitness collapse.
key_factors.text_cn: 美国主场和替补深度支持加时小优，但波黑并无明确体能崩盘证据，因此优势不能放大。
key_factors.text_en: Home context and bench depth support only a modest U.S. extra-time edge, because there is no clear evidence of a Bosnia fitness collapse.

condition_en: Condition: the match is level after 90 minutes; inputs include the full 90-minute prediction, draw score distribution, knockout evidence, normal-time tail scenarios and MAS conclusions.
